prompt: Add a new input source (any non-current source — e.g. 'Pinyin - Simplified' or 'British English'). System Settings > Keyboard > Input Sources > Edit > + > pick a language > Add. Fast path: open the pane with `cerebellum 'settings open com.apple.Keyboard-Settings.extension'`. The eval reads com.apple.HIToolbox AppleEnabledInputSources and expects the source count to have grown by at least 1 since setup.
